name_en: Original Batch Burberry Classic Bestseller Medium Tote, no introduction needed, well-known. The top choice for B-family, suitable for all ages! Excellent look when worn. Made from imported full-grain calfskin, paired with waterproof tartan cotton fabric! Exclusive factory stock, impeccable details and silhouette.
